name: Chocolate Spoons
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and vegetable shortening in a double boiler, stirring until smooth.
2. Dip spoons into the melted mixture, ensuring they are well coated.
3. Place the coated spoons upright in a container and refrigerate until set.
Will coat 6 small spoons (approximately teaspoon size)
Can be wrapped in plastic and given as gifts with ribbons attached!
